title: Error object (protocol-v0)
description: Per protocol-v0.md §3.4 + §14. String `code` (not JSON-RPC numeric) plus a human-readable `message`. Optional `data` carries structured detail (e.g. `{expected_uid, got_uid}` or `{files_done, files_total}`).

code.description: Closed-set error code string. See protocol-v0.md §14 + §14.1 + §7.8b for the canonical catalog. Custom JSON-RPC numeric `-32099` (CANCELLED), `-32098` (DAEMON_UNAVAILABLE), `-32097` (DAEMON_DOWN) overlap the string codes one-to-one.

message.description: Human-readable reason. Not machine-parsed; agents branch on `code` (and `data.code` for `INVALID_PARAMS` sub-codes per §7.8b).

data.description: Optional structured detail. For Index.Grep v2 errors this carries a `code` sub-string from the closed set in §7.8b ('MULTILINE_REQUIRES_REGEX', 'STRUCTURAL_REQUIRES_LANGUAGE', etc.). For shim-emitted transport errors (§14.1) it carries `transient`, `retry_after_ms`, `attempt`, `first_failure_ms_ago`.
